weapons.name: Daemonic (3)
weapons.range: TB 3 against all damage (included in armour). Immune to poison, disease, and environmental hazards. Unstable — takes 1d10 damage per round from Holy attacks or blessed weapons.

weapons.name: Fear (3)
weapons.range: All characters within sight must pass a Hard (-20) Willpower test or suffer Fear effects.

weapons.name: Blood for the Blood God
weapons.range: Gains +10 WS for each enemy killed in the current encounter (cumulative).

weapons.name: From Beyond
weapons.range: Immune to Fear, Pinning, Insanity, and mind-affecting powers.

weapons.name: Warp Instability
weapons.range: If the Bloodletter takes damage and fails a Willpower test, it takes additional damage equal to its degrees of failure. If reduced to 0 wounds, it is banished to the Warp.

weapons.name: Lightning Attack
weapons.range: May make 3 melee attacks per round as a Full Action.

weapons.name: Unnatural Strength (3)
weapons.range: SB is effectively doubled +3 for melee damage (accounted in Hellblade damage).

system.skills:
S: | T: | Ag: Dodge +10
Int: Forbidden Lore (Daemonology)
Per: Awareness +10
WP:
Fel:

description.value:
Bloodletters are the Lesser Daemons of Khorne, the Blood God. They are tall, sinewy humanoids with red skin, elongated skulls, and burning eyes. Each carries a Hellblade — a weapon forged from a fraction of Khorne's own rage, capable of cutting through any armour.

Tactics: Bloodletters charge directly into melee at maximum speed. They do not use ranged weapons — Khorne despises cowardice. They use Lightning Attack to deliver three devastating strikes per round. They target the strongest-looking enemy first — Khorne demands worthy skulls. They are extremely dangerous in close combat and should be engaged at range if possible. Holy or blessed weapons are dramatically more effective.
